preconditions: I can only activate an infusion visit A if it is not the case that the visit A is active and it is not the case that the visit is finalized for A
effects: Once I activate an infusion visit A, it is the case that the visit A is active

assign_chair_to_visit.description: assign an infusion chair B to an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only assign an infusion chair B to an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and B is available and A is eligible for B
I can only assign an infusion chair B to an infusion visit A if it is not the case that the chair for A is reserved
effects: Once I assign an infusion chair B to an infusion visit A, it is the case that A is assigned to the chair B and the chair for A is reserved
Once I assign an infusion chair B to an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_chair_from_visit.description: release an infusion chair B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release an infusion chair B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that A is assigned to the chair B
I can only release an infusion chair B from an infusion visit A if it is not the case that treatment has started for A and it is not the case that clinical checks have been completed for A
effects: Once I release an infusion chair B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an infusion chair B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the chair B and it is not the case anymore that the chair for A is reserved and it is not the case anymore that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed and it is not the case anymore that the medication for A is ready and it is not the case anymore that additional intervention is required for A and it is not the case anymore that the procedure is ready for execution for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a pharmacy return pending

reserve_supply_cart.description: reserve a supply cart B for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a supply cart B for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and supply cart available B
effects: Once I reserve a supply cart B for an infusion visit A, it is the case that A is assigned supply cart B
Once I reserve a supply cart B for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that supply cart available B

release_supply_cart.description: release a supply cart B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release a supply cart B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that A is assigned supply cart B
effects: Once I release a supply cart B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that supply cart available B
Once I release a supply cart B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned supply cart B

confirm_nurse_presence.description: confirm nurse presence for an infusion visit A with a supply cart B
preconditions: I can only confirm nurse presence for an infusion visit A with a supply cart B if it is the case that the visit A is active and the chair for A is reserved and A is assigned supply cart B
I can only confirm nurse presence for an infusion visit A with a supply cart B if it is not the case that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm nurse presence for an infusion visit A with a supply cart B, it is the case that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed

confirm_nurse_assignment_with_support_st.description: confirm nurse assignment for an infusion visit A with support from a support staff B
preconditions: I can only confirm nurse assignment for an infusion visit A with support from a support staff B if it is the case that the visit A is active and the chair for A is reserved and B is available
I can only confirm nurse assignment for an infusion visit A with support from a support staff B if it is not the case that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm nurse assignment for an infusion visit A with support from a support staff B, it is the case that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed and additional intervention is required for A
Once I confirm nurse assignment for an infusion visit A with support from a support staff B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

perform_pharmacy_medication_prep.description: perform pharmacy medication preparation for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B by a pharmacy technician C
preconditions: I can only perform pharmacy medication preparation for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B by a pharmacy technician C if it is the case that the nurse assignment for A is confirmed and the chair for A is reserved and A is assigned supply cart B and C is available as a pharmacy technician
I can only perform pharmacy medication preparation for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B by a pharmacy technician C if it is not the case that the medication for A is ready
effects: Once I perform pharmacy medication preparation for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B by a pharmacy technician C, it is the case that the medication for A is ready
Once I perform pharmacy medication preparation for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B by a pharmacy technician C, it is not the case anymore that additional intervention is required for A

reserve_monitoring_and_mark_med_ready.description: reserve a monitoring station B and mark medication ready for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a monitoring station B and mark medication ready for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the chair for A is reserved and B is reserved for the visit A
I can only reserve a monitoring station B and mark medication ready for an infusion visit A if it is not the case that the medication for A is ready
effects: Once I reserve a monitoring station B and mark medication ready for an infusion visit A, it is the case that the medication for A is ready
Once I reserve a monitoring station B and mark medication ready for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that additional intervention is required for A

reserve_med_prep_resource.description: reserve a medication prep resource B for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medication prep resource B for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and B is available and A is eligible for B
effects: Once I reserve a medication prep resource B for an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is allocated for medication preparation for A
Once I reserve a medication prep resource B for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_med_prep_resource.description: release a medication prep resource B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release a medication prep resource B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that B is allocated for medication preparation for A
effects: Once I release a medication prep resource B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medication prep resource B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated for medication preparation for A

reserve_nurse_for_visit.description: reserve a registered nurse B for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a registered nurse B for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and B is available and A is eligible for B
effects: Once I reserve a registered nurse B for an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I reserve a registered nurse B for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_nurse_from_visit.description: release a registered nurse B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release a registered nurse B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a registered nurse B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a registered nurse B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

reserve_equipment_for_visit.description: reserve a clinical equipment B for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical equipment B for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and B is available and A is eligible for B
effects: Once I reserve a clinical equipment B for an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I reserve a clinical equipment B for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_equipment_from_visit.description: release a clinical equipment B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical equipment B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a clinical equipment B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical equipment B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

reserve_medication_batch_for_visit.description: reserve a medication batch B for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medication batch B for an infusion visit A if it is the case that the visit A is active and B is available and A is eligible for B
effects: Once I reserve a medication batch B for an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I reserve a medication batch B for an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_medication_batch_from_visit.description: release a medication batch B from an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only release a medication batch B from an infusion visit A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a medication batch B from an infusion visit A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medication batch B from an infusion visit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

initiate_infusion_procedure_with_order.description: initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a medication prep resource C, and a registered nurse D
preconditions: I can only initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a medication prep resource C, and a registered nurse D if it is the case that the chair for A is reserved and C is allocated for medication preparation for A and D is assigned to A and B is available and A is eligible for B

I can only initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a medication prep resource C, and a registered nurse D if it is not the case that treatment has started for A
effects: Once I initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a medication prep resource C, and a registered nurse D, it is the case that B is assigned to A and treatment has started for A
Once I initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a medication prep resource C, and a registered nurse D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

initiate_infusion_procedure_with_equipme.description: initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a clinical equipment C and a sterile prep area D
preconditions: I can only initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a clinical equipment C and a sterile prep area D if it is the case that the chair for A is reserved and C is allocated to A and D is available for sterile preparation and B is available and A is eligible for B and A is eligible for D
I can only initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a clinical equipment C and a sterile prep area D if it is not the case that treatment has started for A
effects: Once I initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a clinical equipment C and a sterile prep area D, it is the case that B is assigned to A and treatment has started for A and A has a pharmacy return pending and additional intervention is required for A

Once I initiate infusion procedure for an infusion visit A with a treatment order B, using a clinical equipment C and a sterile prep area D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available for sterile preparation

complete_preprocedure_pharmacy_handoff.description: complete preprocedure pharmacy handoff for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C
preconditions: I can only complete preprocedure pharmacy handoff for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C if it is the case that treatment has started for A and A has a pharmacy return pending and B is allocated for medication preparation for A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I complete preprocedure pharmacy handoff for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C, it is not the case anymore that A has a pharmacy return pending and it is not the case anymore that additional intervention is required for A

perform_zone_based_clinical_checks.description: perform zone based clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C in an operational zone an operational zone a D
preconditions: I can only perform zone based clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C in an operational zone an operational zone a D if it is the case that the medication for A is ready and treatment has started for A and B is allocated for medication preparation for A and C is assigned to A and A is assigned to the operational zone D

I can only perform zone based clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C in an operational zone an operational zone a D if it is not the case that additional intervention is required for A and it is not the case that clinical checks have been completed for A
effects: Once I perform zone based clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a medication prep resource B with a registered nurse C in an operational zone an operational zone a D, it is the case that clinical checks have been completed for A

perform_zone_b_checks_with_equipment_and.description: perform zone b checks for an infusion visit A using a clinical equipment B and a medication batch C in an operational zone b D
preconditions: I can only perform zone b checks for an infusion visit A using a clinical equipment B and a medication batch C in an operational zone b D if it is the case that the medication for A is ready and treatment has started for A and B is allocated to A and C is allocated to A and A is assigned to the operational zone D

I can only perform zone b checks for an infusion visit A using a clinical equipment B and a medication batch C in an operational zone b D if it is not the case that clinical checks have been completed for A
effects: Once I perform zone b checks for an infusion visit A using a clinical equipment B and a medication batch C in an operational zone b D, it is the case that clinical checks have been completed for A and additional intervention is required for A

start_treatment_procedure.description: start treatment procedure for an infusion visit A with a medication prep resource B and a registered nurse C
preconditions: I can only start treatment procedure for an infusion visit A with a medication prep resource B and a registered nurse C if it is the case that clinical checks have been completed for A and additional intervention is required for A and B is allocated for medication preparation for A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I start treatment procedure for an infusion visit A with a medication prep resource B and a registered nurse C, it is the case that the procedure is ready for execution for A

Once I start treatment procedure for an infusion visit A with a medication prep resource B and a registered nurse C, it is not the case anymore that additional intervention is required for A and it is not the case anymore that the medication for A is ready and it is not the case anymore that A has a pharmacy return pending

perform_pharmacy_staging.description: perform pharmacy staging for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C
preconditions: I can only perform pharmacy staging for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C if it is the case that the procedure is ready for execution for A and clinical checks have been completed for A and the chair for A is reserved and A is assigned supply cart B and C is available as a pharmacy technician
I can only perform pharmacy staging for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C if it is not the case that the medication for A is ready
effects: Once I perform pharmacy staging for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C, it is the case that the medication for A is ready

mark_cart_staged.description: mark a supply cart B as staged for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only mark a supply cart B as staged for an infusion visit A if it is the case that clinical checks have been completed for A and the medication for A is ready and A is assigned supply cart B
I can only mark a supply cart B as staged for an infusion visit A if it is not the case that additional intervention is required for A and it is not the case that the cart is staged for A
effects: Once I mark a supply cart B as staged for an infusion visit A, it is the case that the cart is staged for A

stage_cart_with_support_staff.description: stage cart for an infusion visit A with assistance from a support staff B
preconditions: I can only stage cart for an infusion visit A with assistance from a support staff B if it is the case that clinical checks have been completed for A and the medication for A is ready and B is available

I can only stage cart for an infusion visit A with assistance from a support staff B if it is not the case that additional intervention is required for A and it is not the case that the cart is staged for A
effects: Once I stage cart for an infusion visit A with assistance from a support staff B, it is the case that the cart is staged for A
Once I stage cart for an infusion visit A with assistance from a support staff B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_monitoring_to_visit.description: assign an infusion visit A to a monitoring station B for monitoring
preconditions: I can only assign an infusion visit A to a monitoring station B for monitoring if it is the case that the cart is staged for A and B is available for monitoring and A is compatible with the monitoring station B
effects: Once I assign an infusion visit A to a monitoring station B for monitoring, it is the case that A is assigned to the monitoring station B
Once I assign an infusion visit A to a monitoring station B for monitoring, it is not the case anymore that B is available for monitoring

reserve_monitoring_for_variant_pairing.description: reserve a monitoring station C for a visit variant b A paired with a visit variant a visit variant a B
preconditions: I can only reserve a monitoring station C for a visit variant b A paired with a visit variant a visit variant a B if it is the case that the visit A is active and A has a visit variant b flag and the visit variant monitoring preference for A is C and B is assigned to the monitoring station C
I can only reserve a monitoring station C for a visit variant b A paired with a visit variant a visit variant a B if it is not the case that C is reserved for the visit A
effects: Once I reserve a monitoring station C for a visit variant b A paired with a visit variant a visit variant a B, it is the case that C is reserved for the visit A

perform_final_clinical_checks.description: perform final clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C
preconditions: I can only perform final clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C if it is the case that the visit A is active and A has a visit variant b flag and the medication for A is ready and the cart is staged for A and A is assigned supply cart B and C is available as a pharmacy technician
I can only perform final clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C if it is not the case that the final check for A is complete
effects: Once I perform final clinical checks for an infusion visit A using a supply cart B with a pharmacy technician C, it is the case that the final check for A is complete

finalize_visit_administration.description: finalize visit administration for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only finalize visit administration for an infusion visit A if it is the case that A has a visit variant a flag and the visit A is active and the chair for A is reserved and treatment has started for A and clinical checks have been completed for A and the cart is staged for A and the medication for A is ready
I can only finalize visit administration for an infusion visit A if it is not the case that the visit is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize visit administration for an infusion visit A, it is the case that the visit is finalized for A

finalize_visit_with_monitoring.description: finalize visit with monitoring for an infusion visit A using a monitoring station B
preconditions: I can only finalize visit with monitoring for an infusion visit A using a monitoring station B if it is the case that A has a visit variant b flag and the visit A is active and the chair for A is reserved and treatment has started for A and clinical checks have been completed for A and the cart is staged for A and the medication for A is ready and B is reserved for the visit A
I can only finalize visit with monitoring for an infusion visit A using a monitoring station B if it is not the case that the visit is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize visit with monitoring for an infusion visit A using a monitoring station B, it is the case that the visit is finalized for A

finalize_visit_after_final_check.description: finalize visit after final check for an infusion visit A
preconditions: I can only finalize visit after final check for an infusion visit A if it is the case that A has a visit variant b flag and the visit A is active and the chair for A is reserved and treatment has started for A and clinical checks have been completed for A and the cart is staged for A and the medication for A is ready and the final check for A is complete
I can only finalize visit after final check for an infusion visit A if it is not the case that the visit is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize visit after final check for an infusion visit A, it is the case that the visit is finalized for A

action_nl_templates.assign_chair_to_visit: assign infusion chair {?infusion_chair} to infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.release_chair_from_visit: release infusion chair {?infusion_chair} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}

action_nl_templates.release_supply_cart: release supply cart {?supply_cart} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}

action_nl_templates.reserve_monitoring_and_mark_med_ready: reserve monitoring station {?monitoring_station} and mark medication ready for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.reserve_med_prep_resource: reserve medication prep resource {?medication_prep_resource} for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.release_med_prep_resource: release medication prep resource {?medication_prep_resource} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.reserve_nurse_for_visit: reserve registered nurse {?registered_nurse} for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.release_nurse_from_visit: release registered nurse {?registered_nurse} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.reserve_equipment_for_visit: reserve clinical equipment {?clinical_equipment} for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.release_equipment_from_visit: release clinical equipment {?clinical_equipment} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.reserve_medication_batch_for_visit: reserve medication batch {?medication_batch} for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.release_medication_batch_from_visit: release medication batch {?medication_batch} from infusion visit {?infusion_visit}
action_nl_templates.initiate_infusion_procedure_with_order: initiate infusion procedure for infusion visit {?infusion_visit} with treatment order {?treatment_order}, using medication prep resource {?medication_prep_resource}, and registered nurse {?registered_nurse}

action_nl_templates.perform_zone_b_checks_with_equipment_and: perform zone b checks for infusion visit {?infusion_visit} using clinical equipment {?clinical_equipment} and medication batch {?medication_batch} in operational zone b {?operational_zone_b}

action_nl_templates.perform_pharmacy_staging: perform pharmacy staging for infusion visit {?infusion_visit} using supply cart {?supply_cart} with pharmacy technician {?pharmacy_technician}

action_nl_templates.reserve_monitoring_for_variant_pairing: reserve monitoring station {?monitoring_station} for visit variant b {?visit_variant_b} paired with visit variant a {?visit_variant_a}

action_nl_templates.finalize_visit_administration: finalize visit administration for infusion visit {?infusion_visit}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a infusion visit or a infusion chair or a treatment order or a registered nurse or a medication prep resource or a clinical equipment or a supply cart or a support staff or a monitoring station or a pharmacy technician or a sterile prep area or a medication batch or a clinical area is also a object
Everything that is a operational zone a or a operational zone b is also a clinical area
Everything that is a visit variant a or a visit variant b is also a infusion visit
